name: Renae
seeking: Seeks JV partners who can refer business clients seeking professional expertise or measurable results in their engagements. Limited profile data suggests openness to cross-referral arrangements with professionals in aligned business service areas.
who_you_serve: J.Renee serves a wide range of organizations and events, including corporations, women's leadership programs, employee resource groups, professional development events, faith and marketplace initiatives, colleges and universities, student leadership, women's empowerment, campus faith communities, Greek-letter organizations, faith and women's conferences, women's ministries, church conferences, marketplace ministry gatherings, entrepreneurial events, business summits, retreats, masterminds, and e-commerce and startup trainings.
what_you_do: J.Renee is an entrepreneur, author, coach, speaker, and faith-driven strategist who empowers women of faith to shatter glass ceilings, break through limitations, and maximize their potential in both life and business using strategy, confidence, and fearless faith.
offering: Renae (J.Renee) offers access to an exceptionally broad network spanning corporations, universities, faith communities, women's leadership programs, and entrepreneurial events, making her a high-leverage JV partner for reaching women of faith in both marketplace and ministry contexts. Her multi-format platform as speaker, author, coach, and strategist enables diverse collaboration structures from co-promotions to event partnerships.
bio: Renae is an experienced professional bringing expertise and dedication to every engagement, focused on delivering measurable results.
business_focus: J.Renee is an entrepreneur, author, coach, speaker, and faith-driven strategist who empowers women of faith to shatter glass ceilings, break through limitations, and maximize their potential in both life and business using strategy, confidence, and fearless faith. (faith-driven entrepreneurship)
